scripts.compose:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/migrate-db.ps1 && docker compose up -d api frontend worker-workflow worker-document
scripts.api:dev: cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-exclude generated_workflows/** --reload-exclude backend/generated_workflows/** --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
